meaning: n.落下的方式,影响范围,[物理]入射
examples: The incidence of breast cancer increases with age.
Incidence of the disease is fairly evenly spread across Europe.
Authentic Italian cooking is very healthy—witness the low incidence of heart disease in Italy.
Oysters grown in pristine northern waters, say Maine or Washington, have extremely low incidence of bacteria.
Auerbach has written an accessible summary of the literature on the incidence of the tax.
